creator: jcfyecrayz@liamekaens.com
text:
Comment on attachment 205022
[patch] fix configure error if DOCS=on X11=off after ports r480951 (when DOCS was spelled GTKDOC)

After ports/r519952, this patch is obsolete.  I believe attachment 206196 is as well.

But attachment 209962 is still needed - see comment 44.
